key.name: panel-position
key.description: Where to place the indicator: 'left', 'center', or 'right'.

key.name: max-visible-items
key.description: Maximum tickers shown at once in the panel (1–5).

key.name: enable-rotation
key.description: Rotate through symbols in the panel when there are more than max-visible.

key.name: pinned-symbols
key.description: Symbols always shown in panel, never rotated out.

key.name: show-change-percent
key.description: Show percentage change in panel and popup.

key.name: show-time
key.description: Show last update time in popup rows.

key.name: compact-mode
key.description: Smaller font and tighter spacing in panel.

key.name: debug
key.description: Print debug messages to the journal.
